markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review GrowthX's draft content strategy for Vizcom's blog.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Approved:** Vizcom approved the draft strategy's five content clusters, which will serve as the foundation for the upcoming content calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
  - [**Competitor Analysis Expanded:** Analysis will now include node-based tools (e.g., Flora, Weeby) to capture top-of-funnel traffic and expand Vizcom's TAM to include digital designers.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
  - [**Product Scope Broadened:** Content will highlight Vizcom's full platform capabilities—beyond just sketch-to-3D—to include animation, quick edits, and real textures.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
  - [**Critical SEO Issue:** The `vizcom.ai` → `vizcom.com` migration has a critical indexing error in Google Search Console (GSC), showing zero clicks. GrowthX will help investigate.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1998.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy: Goals & Analysis

  - [**Context:** Vizcom is starting its SEO content from scratch, with the current blog focused on product updates and company news.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [**Primary Goals:**](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
      - [Balance Vizcom's perception across verticals (beyond just automotive/footwear).](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
      - [Drive measurable visibility via rankings and AI discoverability (measured with Looker & Scrunch).](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
      - [Increase conversions from content → signups → paid users.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [**Competitor Analysis:**](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
      - [**Architecture/Manufacturing:** AutoCAD, Autodesk, SketchUp, Chaos.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
      - [**Fashion:** Newark, Newblack (blogs noted as low quality).](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [**High-Quality Example:** Chaos's blog, which blends foundational education with AI trends.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Content Strategy: Proposed Clusters

  - [**1. Product Rendering Techniques & Technology:**](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
      - [**Focus:** Technical aspects and output quality of rendering.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
      - [**Goal:** Capture designers researching rendering methods and software.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
      - [**Tactic:** Use listicles (e.g., "best rendering software") to rank quickly in LLM responses.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [**2. Sketch-to-3D Workflows & Design Iteration:**](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [**Focus:** Vizcom's unique multimodal input and rapid prototyping.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [**Goal:** Position Vizcom as the solution for efficient design exploration.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [**Tactic:** Mix high-volume educational topics with low-volume, high-intent keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [**3. Industry-Specific Design Solutions:**](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
      - [**Focus:** Use cases across verticals (automotive, footwear, apparel, product design).](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
      - [**Goal:** Demonstrate Vizcom's value in diverse industries.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
      - [**Tactic:** Expand the list of covered verticals as needed.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [**4. Optimizing Design Workflows:**](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
      - [**Focus:** Productivity, collaboration, and business value.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
      - [**Goal:** Address buyer concerns about efficiency and ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [**5. AI Tool Adoption & Prompt Engineering for Designers:**](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
      - [**Focus:** Strategic use of AI in design, from tool selection to prompt writing.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
      - [**Goal:** Capture traffic for informational queries and commercial intent (e.g., "Midjourney alternatives").](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)

### Content Generation Workflow: "Agentic Pipeline"

  - [Aida demoed the "agentic pipeline" in the Atlas workspace, which uses AI agents to self-correct and ensure quality.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
    1.  [**Manual Outline:** GrowthX creates a detailed outline based on top-ranking content to ensure comprehensive, rank-worthy structure.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
    2.  [**Research:** An agent uses Tavoli & EXA (replacing Perplexity for higher quality) to find sources, then grades its own research and re-searches if needed.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
    3.  [**Drafting:** An agent writes the article, pulling from the research and Vizcom's artifacts (company brief, personas, writing guidelines).](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)
    4.  [**Self-Correction:** The agent grades the draft against writing guidelines and a proofreader checklist, then automatically revises to fix errors.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
    5.  [**Manual Review:** A human editor performs a final check for accuracy and adds internal/source links.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1895.0)
    6.  [**Image Generation:** An in-house designer creates featured images using Vizcom's brand guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)

### Technical & Operational Items

  - [**Domain Migration SEO Issue:**](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1998.0)
      - [**Problem:** The `vizcom.ai` → `vizcom.com` migration (1+ month ago) shows zero clicks in GSC.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=2020.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** The issue may stem from incorrect 301 redirects or a missing domain change request in GSC.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=2054.0)
      - [**Action:** Vizcom will connect GrowthX with their CTO to investigate.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [**Brand Guidelines for Images:**](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=2165.0)
      - [**Need:** GrowthX requires brand guidelines (colors, fonts, style) to generate on-brand featured images.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=2165.0)
      - [**Action:** Emily will add Maura (Senior Brand & Web Designer) to the Slack channel to provide these assets.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=2269.0)
  - [**Writing Style & Tone:**](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=2445.0)
      - [**Action:** Vizcom will provide external examples of thought leadership and guide-style content to refine the writing guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=2445.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=2136.0)
      - [Follow up in Slack with questions for Vizcom's CTO regarding the GSC indexing issue.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
      - [Begin in-depth keyword research for the content calendar, incorporating new competitors and product features.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
  - [**Emily:**](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=2427.0)
      - [Add Kaylin (CTO) to the Slack channel to discuss the domain migration.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=2405.0)
      - [Add Maura (Senior Brand & Web Designer) to the Slack channel to provide brand guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=2269.0)
      - [Provide external examples of thought leadership and guide-style content to refine writing guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=2445.0)
      - [Leave comments on the three initial artifacts (company brief, personas, writing guidelines) by EOD.](https://fathom.video/share/qF6oZdaB2sr_EGfxaByzsbLVbbRhv2-d?tab=summary&timestamp=2427.0)
